name: Watch spend with HTTP / REST API and Slack in real time

parameters.content:
### Every Few Minutes

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 10 min. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Fetch Target Page

### Fetch Target Page

GET https://example-market.com/metrics — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Next: Extract Listings (CSS)

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Extract Listings (CSS)

Extracts structured values from raw HTML via CSS selectors.

Next: Rows from Arrays

### Rows from Arrays

Custom JavaScript: Zip parallel arrays into one item per listing

Next: Diff vs Last Run

### Load Previous Snapshot

googleSheets — `read` operation against the connected account.

Next: Diff vs Last Run

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Diff vs Last Run

Diffs two streams by key into 4 lanes: only-in-A, same, different, only-in-B — the heart of the sync.

Ports: ①→ Alert New Findings · ③→ Update Changed Rows · ④→ Write Fresh Snapshot

### Alert New Findings

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Diff Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Update Changed Rows

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Diff Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Write Fresh Snapshot

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Diff Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Merge Diff Outcomes

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Watch spend with HTTP / REST API and Slack in real time

**Pattern:** Threshold Monitoring · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Watch spend with HTTP / REST API and Slack in real time. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual kpi reports is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Every Few Minutes → Fetch Target Page → Extract Listings (CSS) → Rows from Arrays → Diff vs Last Run → Alert New Findings → Merge Diff Outcomes

## Use it for
- Teams that want to threshold monitoring without manual effort
- Anyone automating kpi reports in data
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Scales without extra headcount
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Google OAuth2 / service account; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🧹 Data quality

Dedupe/diff steps make re-runs safe: the same input twice will not create duplicate records. If you change the key fields, clear n8n's dedupe memory (node → 'Clear stored keys') before the next run.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your kpi reports process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
